message:
feat(fsqlite-core): wire BEGIN CONCURRENT through MVCC ConcurrentRegistry (bd-14zc)

- Add MVCC imports and state fields to Connection struct
- Create concurrent session via registry.begin_concurrent() in execute_begin()
- Implement FCW validation via concurrent_commit() in execute_commit()
- Release page locks via concurrent_abort() in execute_rollback()
- Add BusySnapshot error variant for concurrent commit conflicts
- Add 5 new tests for MVCC session lifecycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
